title: Add progress info in a Gantt
excerpt: I would like to be able to add the progress of an item in a gantt view (whether the progress is a column of the board or a mirroring column of other boards)

posts.author: Van2a (Vanessa CENTRONI)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to add the progress of an item in a gantt view (whether the progress is a column of the board or a mirroring column of other boards)
